description_long: This is a modern countertop microwave oven with a rectangular, boxy form and a predominantly black exterior. The front features a large, dark-tinted glass window set into the door, allowing visibility into the cooking chamber. To the right of the window, there is a vertical control panel with two display screens and several buttons arranged in a grid, as well as a circular dial or button at the bottom. The sides and top are solid and unadorned, with a matte black finish, while the rear and left side are featureless except for a small vent on the lower rear right. The door handle is integrated along the right edge of the door, running vertically and blending seamlessly with the design. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for placement in kitchens, break rooms, or urban communal spaces.
description: A sleek, black microwave oven with a large front glass window, vertical control panel, and integrated door handle. Its minimalist design features a matte finish and subtle venting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass window, vertical control panel with displays and buttons, and the integrated door handle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, solid black surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely solid, featureless black panel with no visible controls or vents.
description_view_3: Right side view with a small rectangular vent near the lower rear and otherwise a plain black surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring two rectangular display screens at the top, followed by a grid of four square buttons, and a large circular button or dial at the bottom. There is no visible labeling or illuminated indicators.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical, integrated strip along the right edge of the door, matching the black color of the microwave and blending seamlessly with the door's design. It is flush with the surface and appears to be made of plastic.
attribute_vent_placement: A single small rectangular vent is located on the lower rear portion of the right side panel. No other vents are visible on the top, left, or rear surfaces.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular, dark-tinted glass window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing visibility into the interior.
